title: Beat It
why_this_song: Pure imperative drill — 'beat it', 'don't be afraid', 'show them how funky strong is your fight'. A2 students get saturated with commands.
grammar_callouts: 'show them how X is your Y' — inverted construction

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_before: They told him, "Don't you ever come

exercises.excerpt: They'll kick you, then they'll beat you
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Beat It" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Beat It" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.excerpt_after: him, "Don't you ever come around here"

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "funky" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "funky" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: "Don't wanna see your face, you better disappear"
Then they'll tell you it's fair
Beat it (beat it), beat it (beat it)

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Every line of the chorus is a command. Drill imperatives until students can hear them instinctively.

lines: It doesn't matter who's wrong or right
